title: Umarian brothers
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|brothers}}
The '''Umarian brothers''' were four [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] brothers who were imprisoned aboard the [[Devastator/Legends|''Devastator'']]. When the ship suffered an unexpected power failure, the brothers joined forces with a band of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] captives and escaped the ship.<ref name="Loyalties">{{JournalCite|4|Loyalties}}</ref>

The Umarian brothers were:
*[[Cade Umarian]]<ref name="Loyalties" />
*[[Ferm Umarian]]<ref name="Loyalties" />
*[[Jole Umarian]]<ref name="Loyalties" />
*[[Pano Umarian]]<ref name="Loyalties" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|4|Loyalties}} {{1st}}
